description.en: Method called when an empty line is entered in response to the prompt. If this method is not overridden, it repeats the last nonempty command entered.

excerpt.es: Method called when an empty line is entered in response to the prompt. If this method is not overridden, it repeats the last nonempty command entered.
excerpt.en: Method called when an empty line is entered in response to the prompt. If this method is not overridden, it repeats the last nonempty command entered.
